summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OrthoConnect platform - patient-first orthopaedic discovery platform for India. All core features working excellently including search with OpenStreetMap, surgeon registration, admin approval workflow, and conditions hub.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 422 instead of 400 for invalid search (missing location parameter)
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - error handling works but status code inconsistent

passed_tests: Home page loads with header + search console
Search by pincode (400001) returns list results and map markers
Doctor profile pages load with complete information
Multi-step Join as Surgeon form (Identity, Practice, Clinic steps)
Condition detail pages with disclaimer and embedded search
Surgeon profile creation and approval workflow
Search functionality with geocoding and radius
Profile approval and public search integration
